ai_insight.title: World Brief
ai_insight.text: [LIVE] Coalition naval operations near Strait of Hormuz have entered a sustained posture phase. Iran's deployment of additional coastal defense assets signals a willingness to maintain the blockade. Energy markets, insurance pricing, and diplomatic back-channels are now the three primary indicators of near-term trajectory.
